case_title: JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. VS. KABUKI NIGHTCLUB INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING EX PARTE APPLICATION OR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT (AMENDED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMNT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KABUKI NIGHTCLUB INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 22 PEACE PLAZA, SUITE 525, SAN FRANICSCO $93,868.98 RENT, $2,836.25 ATTORNEY FEES, $470.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $97,175.23, SEE SCANNED DOC
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT KABUKI NIGHTCLUB INC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT KABUKI NIGHTCLUB INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF JAPAN CENTER WEST ASSOCIATES L.P.
